test_name: Schedule and Manage Automated Test Executions
description: This scenario verifies the ability to schedule automated test executions and manage them effectively on the platform.
steps: Navigate to the RoostGPT Test Dashboard.
Locate the scheduling section for test executions.
Select a test case for scheduling.
Choose a future date and time for the test execution.
Set up any necessary execution parameters.
Confirm and save the scheduled execution.
Verify the scheduled execution appears in the list.
Wait for the scheduled time and monitor the execution process.
Check the execution status and results once the test is completed.
Review any errors or issues reported during the execution.
Access historical execution data to compare results.
expected_results: Scheduled test runs at the specified time.
Execution status and results are available post-execution.
Historical data includes the latest scheduled execution.
edge_cases: Network issues prevent execution at scheduled time.
Incorrect execution parameters lead to failed tests.
dependencies: Test environment must be set up and available.
Network and system stability during execution.
api_interactions: Monitor API calls for scheduling test executions.
Log execution results and status updates.
Check API responses for execution confirmation.
performance_metrics: Measure time taken to schedule a test execution.
Evaluate system responsiveness during execution monitoring.
Analyze load times for historical data retrieval.
accessibility_requirements: Ensure scheduling interface is keyboard accessible.
Verify screen readers announce scheduled executions.
Check for color contrast in scheduling section UI.
